Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Oh, you must be the new kid. Let me give you some advice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Make sure you study hard for exams. There will be some tricky questions.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}If you only study at home, don't you ever feel like you're not studying enough?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}If you do, then I recommend making use of the library.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}You can use the books there and concentrate on studying in silence, and it's free![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Only time will tell...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I'm not gonna worry about my score.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I'm neither happy nor disappointed with my score, since it's about average.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}How'd you do, new guy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Did you hear about the two people who were found unconscious?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I bet fewer people will be cheating on their significant others from now on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}After all, one of them was a man and the other a woman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Those are pretty incriminating circumstances, if you ask me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Finals are a lot harder than midterms, you know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}That doesn't necessarily mean I'll study harder...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}But we'll see. Sometimes the extra effort pays off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}It seems like the average score went down this time... I guess that's good for me, though.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}But honestly, I'm a little disappointed. I think I could've scored about twenty points higher.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I'll have to study harder during vacation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}The first semester is just a warmup. The game starts for real during the second semester.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}You better use the library or study a lot at home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}This time, I know I did pretty good. I can't wait for the results.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I was happy with my score. All that studying I did during summer vacation paid off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}This test is just another small mountain on my path...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}The true challenge is the college entrance exams... Everything else is just practice.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I'm sure we'll both study more than we ever imagined we'd have to for them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}That was a hard test. I'm not sure how I did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I guess I'll have to wait for the scores to be posted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}I actually did pretty well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}Now I don't have to be depressed during the break.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}How about y— Um... You look kinda pale...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 310}W-Well, it's not the end of the world. Plus, you have another chance...[n]{f 1 1}
